HomePage.enterTeacherName: Enter your name to get started
HomePage.workspaceCreatedDesc: Copy and save your access code. You will need it to manage your exercises later.

EditExercise.title: Edit Exercise
EditExercise.editSubtitle: Update your exercise content and save changes.
EditExercise.createSubtitle: Fill in the details to create a new exercise set.
EditExercise.exerciseTitleHelper: Give your exercise a clear and descriptive title.
EditExercise.question: Question
EditExercise.bulkInputPlaceholder:
I [went] to [school] yesterday.
I have an [apple].
EditExercise.bulkInputHelper: Format: Text with [answers] in brackets. One question per line.
EditExercise.validationError: Please check your input. Each line must contain at least one answer in [].
